headline: The American Train Dispatchers Association and Union Pacific Railroad Reach Agreement to Protect Union Jobs for Life
summary: OMAHA, Neb., April 02, 2026--The American Train Dispatchers Association (ATDA) and Union Pacific Railroad reached an agreement that guarantees jobs for life for union employees after Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern combine to create America’s first single-line, coast-to-coast railroad.

headline: Delta Air Lines to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: DAL to report Q1 2026 earnings on April 8, higher fuel and labor costs vs strong bookings have lifted its revenue outlook to $15-$15.3B.
